Deterministic Solidity compile using local solc-js 0.8.28+commit.7893614a.Emscripten.clang (package solc 0.8.28).
Direct solc-js compile passed with 0 project warnings and 0 fatal errors. Suppressed upstream dependency warnings: 0.

compile:deterministic completed without Hardhat compiler download.


  GoalOS ownership handoff
    ✔ sets constructor admin as owner and does not privilege deployer when admin differs (1675ms)
    ✔ atomically migrates owner-held roles and preserves delegated roles (248ms)
    ✔ exposes ownership helper inventory consistently (42ms)

  ownership command-center safety gates
    ✔ blocks Mainnet ownership operations in CI
    ✔ requires exact Mainnet typed confirmation
    ✔ refuses to write public Mainnet evidence from a Hardhat fork
    ✔ requires a validated plan before writing public Mainnet ownership evidence
    ✔ binds approved permanent owners to the reviewed ownership plan
    ✔ rejects proof messages without exact chain binding
    ✔ rejects empty manifests and transfer plans that do not match the manifest
    ✔ uses env or manifest deployer as the independent disposable-owner source for verification
    ✔ classifies two-step transfers pending final-owner acceptance and rejects unsafe latent pending owners
    ✔ keeps legacy one-step transfer compatibility and fails incomplete Safe acceptance plans
    ✔ hashes nested Safe acceptance calldata deterministically
    ✔ allows acceptance validation to use the original expired initiation plan
    ✔ finds a matching journaled transfer before a replacement can be submitted


  16 passing (2s)
